tEn: How Powerful are Graph Neural Networks?
sEn: GNNs are as powerful as the Weisfeiler-Lehman test but limited in distinguishing certain graph structures.
sZh: 图神经网络与Weisfeiler-Lehman测试能力相当，但在区分某些图结构上存在局限。
absEn: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are an effective framework for representation learning of graphs. GNNs follow a neighborhood aggregation scheme, where the representation vector of a node is computed by recursively aggregating and transforming representation vectors of its neighboring nodes. Many GNN variants have been proposed and have achieved state-of-the-art results on both node and graph classification tasks. However, despite GNNs revolutionizing graph representation learning, there is limited understanding of their representational properties and limitations. Here, we present a theoretical framework for analyzing the expressive power of GNNs to capture different graph structures. Our results characterize the discriminative power of popular GNN variants, such as Graph Convolutional Networks and GraphSAGE, and show that they cannot learn to distinguish certain simple graph structures. We then develop a simple architecture that is provably the most expressive among the class of GNNs and is as powerful as the Weisfeiler-Lehman graph isomorphism test. We empirically validate our theoretical findings on a number of graph classification benchmarks, and demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance.
absZh: 图神经网络（GNN）是图表示学习的有效框架，通过邻域聚合方案递归计算节点表示。尽管许多GNN变体在节点和图分类任务上取得了最先进的结果，但其表示能力和局限性尚不明确。本文提出了一个理论框架来分析GNN捕获不同图结构的表达能力，揭示了流行变体（如图卷积网络和GraphSAGE）的判别能力有限，无法区分某些简单图结构。我们进一步开发了一种简单架构，它在GNN类中表达能力最强，且与Weisfeiler-Lehman图同构测试能力相当。实验验证了理论发现，并在多个图分类基准上取得了最先进性能。

contrib.en: Established theoretical framework analyzing GNN expressive power via WL test.
contrib.zh: 建立了通过WL测试分析GNN表达能力的理论框架。

contrib.en: Proved GNNs are at most as powerful as WL test in distinguishing graph structures.
contrib.zh: 证明了GNN在区分图结构方面最多与WL测试能力相当。

contrib.en: Characterized discriminative power of GCN and GraphSAGE, showing they fail on simple structures.
contrib.zh: 刻画了GCN和GraphSAGE的区分能力，表明它们在简单结构上失效。

contrib.en: Developed Graph Isomorphism Network (GIN) with provably maximal expressive power among GNNs.
contrib.zh: 开发了图同构网络（GIN），在GNN中具有可证明的最大表达能力。

contrib.en: Identified conditions for injective aggregation and readout to match WL test power.
contrib.zh: 识别了匹配WL测试能力的单射聚合和读出条件。

contrib.en: Empirically validated theory, showing GIN achieves state-of-the-art on graph classification benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 通过实验验证理论，表明GIN在图分类基准上达到最先进性能。

limits.en: Analysis assumes countable node features; continuous features require further study.
limits.zh: 分析假设节点特征可数；连续特征需进一步研究。

limits.en: Focuses on neighborhood aggregation GNNs; other architectures like attention not covered.
limits.zh: 聚焦于邻域聚合GNN；未涵盖注意力等其他架构。

limits.en: Theoretical bounds based on WL test; some graphs (e.g., regular) remain indistinguishable.
limits.zh: 理论界限基于WL测试；某些图（如正则图）仍无法区分。

limits.en: Generalization properties and optimization landscape not theoretically addressed.
limits.zh: 未从理论上解决泛化性质和优化景观问题。

items.en: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are an effective framework for representation learning of graphs. GNNs follow a neighborhood aggregation scheme, where the representation vector of a node is computed by recursively aggregating and transforming representation vectors of its neighboring nodes. Many GNN variants have been proposed and have achieved state-of-the-art results on both node and graph classification tasks. However, despite GNNs revolutionizing graph representation learning, there is limited understanding of their representational properties and limitations. Here, we present a theoretical framework for analyzing the expressive power of GNNs to capture different graph structures. Our results characterize the discriminative power of popular GNN variants, such as Graph Convolutional Networks and GraphSAGE, and show that they cannot learn to distinguish certain simple graph structures. We then develop a simple architecture that is provably the most expressive among the class of GNNs and is as powerful as the Weisfeiler-Lehman graph isomorphism test. We empirically validate our theoretical findings on a number of graph classification benchmarks, and demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance.
items.zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是图表示学习的有效框架。GNN 遵循邻域聚合方案，其中节点的表示向量通过递归聚合和变换其邻居节点的表示向量来计算。许多 GNN 变体已被提出，并在节点和图分类任务上取得了最先进的结果。然而，尽管 GNN 革新了图表示学习，但对其表示特性和局限性的理解仍然有限。在此，我们提出了一个理论框架来分析 GNN 捕捉不同图结构的表达能力。我们的结果刻画了流行 GNN 变体（如图卷积网络和 GraphSAGE）的区分能力，并表明它们无法学习区分某些简单的图结构。然后，我们开发了一个简单的架构，该架构在 GNN 类中可证明是表达力最强的，并且与 Weisfeiler-Lehman 图同构测试一样强大。我们在多个图分类基准上实证验证了我们的理论发现，并证明我们的模型实现了最先进的性能。

items.en: Learning with graph structured data, such as molecules, social, biological, and financial networks, requires effective representation of their graph structure (Hamilton et al., 2017b). Recently, there has been a surge of interest in Graph Neural Network (GNN) approaches for representation learning of graphs (Li et al., 2016; Hamilton et al., 2017a; Kipf & Welling, 2017; Velickovic et al., 2018; Xu et al., 2018). GNNs broadly follow a recursive neighborhood aggregation (or message passing) scheme, where each node aggregates feature vectors of its neighbors to compute its new feature vector (Xu et al., 2018; Gilmer et al., 2017). After k𝑘k iterations of aggregation, a node is represented by its transformed feature vector, which captures the structural information within the node’s k𝑘k-hop neighborhood. The representation of an entire graph can then be obtained through pooling (Ying et al., 2018), for example, by summing the representation vectors of all nodes in the graph.
items.zh: 学习图结构数据（如分子、社交、生物和金融网络）需要有效表示其图结构（Hamilton 等人，2017b）。最近，人们对用于图表示学习的图神经网络（GNN）方法产生了浓厚兴趣（Li 等人，2016；Hamilton 等人，2017a；Kipf & Welling，2017；Velickovic 等人，2018；Xu 等人，2018）。GNN 广泛遵循递归邻域聚合（或消息传递）方案，其中每个节点聚合其邻居的特征向量以计算其新的特征向量（Xu 等人，2018；Gilmer 等人，2017）。经过 k 次聚合迭代后，节点由其变换后的特征向量表示，该向量捕获了节点 k 跳邻域内的结构信息。然后可以通过池化（Ying 等人，2018）获得整个图的表示，例如，对图中所有节点的表示向量求和。

items.en: Many GNN variants with different neighborhood aggregation and graph-level pooling schemes have been proposed (Scarselli et al., 2009b; Battaglia et al., 2016; Defferrard et al., 2016; Duvenaud et al., 2015; Hamilton et al., 2017a; Kearnes et al., 2016; Kipf & Welling, 2017; Li et al., 2016; Velickovic et al., 2018; Santoro et al., 2017; Xu et al., 2018; Santoro et al., 2018; Verma & Zhang, 2018; Ying et al., 2018; Zhang et al., 2018). Empirically, these GNNs have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many tasks such as node classification, link prediction, and graph classification. However, the design of new GNNs is mostly based on empirical intuition, heuristics, and experimental trial-and-error. There is little theoretical understanding of the properties and limitations of GNNs, and formal analysis of GNNs’ representational capacity is limited.
items.zh: 许多具有不同邻域聚合和图级池化方案的 GNN 变体已被提出（Scarselli 等人，2009b；Battaglia 等人，2016；Defferrard 等人，2016；Duvenaud 等人，2015；Hamilton 等人，2017a；Kearnes 等人，2016；Kipf & Welling，2017；Li 等人，2016；Velickovic 等人，2018；Santoro 等人，2017；Xu 等人，2018；Santoro 等人，2018；Verma & Zhang，2018；Ying 等人，2018；Zhang 等人，2018）。经验上，这些 GNN 在节点分类、链接预测和图分类等许多任务中取得了最先进的性能。然而，新 GNN 的设计主要基于经验直觉、启发式和实验试错。对 GNN 的特性和局限性的理论理解很少，对 GNN 表示能力的正式分析也有限。

items.en: Here, we present a theoretical framework for analyzing the representational power of GNNs. We formally characterize how expressive different GNN variants are in learning to represent and distinguish between different graph structures. Our framework is inspired by the close connection between GNNs and the Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) graph isomorphism test (Weisfeiler & Lehman, 1968), a powerful test known to distinguish a broad class of graphs (Babai & Kucera, 1979). Similar to GNNs, the WL test iteratively updates a given node’s feature vector by aggregating feature vectors of its network neighbors. What makes the WL test so powerful is its injective aggregation update that maps different node neighborhoods to different feature vectors. Our key insight is that a GNN can have as large discriminative power as the WL test if the GNN’s aggregation scheme is highly expressive and can model injective functions.
items.zh: 在此，我们提出了一个分析 GNN 表示能力的理论框架。我们正式刻画了不同 GNN 变体在学习表示和区分不同图结构方面的表达能力。我们的框架受到 GNN 与 Weisfeiler-Lehman（WL）图同构测试（Weisfeiler & Lehman，1968）之间密切联系的启发，WL 测试是一种强大的测试，能够区分广泛的图（Babai & Kucera，1979）。与 GNN 类似，WL 测试通过聚合其网络邻居的特征向量来迭代更新给定节点的特征向量。WL 测试之所以如此强大，在于其单射聚合更新，该更新将不同的节点邻域映射到不同的特征向量。我们的关键见解是，如果 GNN 的聚合方案具有高度表达力并且能够建模单射函数，那么 GNN 可以具有与 WL 测试一样大的区分能力。

items.en: To mathematically formalize the above insight, our framework first represents the set of feature vectors of a given node’s neighbors as a multiset, i.e., a set with possibly repeating elements. Then, the neighbor aggregation in GNNs can be thought of as an aggregation function over the multiset. Hence, to have strong representational power, a GNN must be able to aggregate different multisets into different representations. We rigorously study several variants of multiset functions and theoretically characterize their discriminative power, i.e., how well different aggregation functions can distinguish different multisets. The more discriminative the multiset function is, the more powerful the representational power of the underlying GNN.
items.zh: 为了数学上形式化上述见解，我们的框架首先将给定节点邻居的特征向量集合表示为多重集，即可能包含重复元素的集合。然后，GNN 中的邻居聚合可以被视为对多重集的聚合函数。因此，为了具有强大的表示能力，GNN 必须能够将不同的多重集聚合成不同的表示。我们严格研究了多重集函数的几种变体，并从理论上刻画了它们的区分能力，即不同聚合函数区分不同多重集的能力。多重集函数的区分能力越强，底层 GNN 的表示能力就越强大。

items.en: Our main results are summarized as follows:
items.zh: 我们的主要结果总结如下：

items.en: We show that GNNs are at most as powerful as the WL test in distinguishing graph structures.
items.zh: 我们表明，在区分图结构方面，GNN 最多与 WL 测试一样强大。

items.en: We establish conditions on the neighbor aggregation and graph readout functions under which the resulting GNN is as powerful as the WL test.
items.zh: 我们建立了在邻居聚合和图读出函数上的条件，在这些条件下，得到的 GNN 与 WL 测试一样强大。

items.en: We identify graph structures that cannot be distinguished by popular GNN variants, such as GCN (Kipf & Welling, 2017) and GraphSAGE (Hamilton et al., 2017a), and we precisely characterize the kinds of graph structures such GNN-based models can capture.
items.zh: 我们识别了流行 GNN 变体（如 GCN（Kipf & Welling，2017）和 GraphSAGE（Hamilton 等人，2017a））无法区分的图结构，并精确刻画了此类基于 GNN 的模型可以捕获的图结构类型。

items.en: We develop a simple neural architecture, Graph Isomorphism Network (GIN), and show that its discriminative/representational power is equal to the power of the WL test.
items.zh: 我们开发了一个简单的神经架构——图同构网络（GIN），并表明其区分/表示能力等于 WL 测试的能力。

items.en: We validate our theory via experiments on graph classification datasets, where the expressive power of GNNs is crucial to capture graph structures. In particular, we compare the performance of GNNs with various aggregation functions. Our results confirm that the most powerful GNN by our theory, i.e., Graph Isomorphism Network (GIN), also empirically has high representational power as it almost perfectly fits the training data, whereas the less powerful GNN variants often severely underfit the training data. In addition, the representationally more powerful GNNs outperform the others by test set accuracy and achieve state-of-the-art performance on many graph classification benchmarks.
items.zh: 我们通过图分类数据集上的实验验证了我们的理论，其中 GNN 的表达能力对于捕获图结构至关重要。特别是，我们比较了具有不同聚合函数的 GNN 的性能。我们的结果证实，根据我们的理论，最强大的 GNN（即图同构网络（GIN））在经验上也具有很高的表示能力，因为它几乎完美地拟合了训练数据，而较弱的 GNN 变体通常严重欠拟合训练数据。此外，表示能力更强的 GNN 在测试集准确率上优于其他模型，并在许多图分类基准上取得了最先进的性能。

items.en: Weisfeiler-Lehman test. The graph isomorphism problem asks whether two graphs are topologically identical. This is a challenging problem: no polynomial-time algorithm is known for it yet (Garey, 1979; Garey & Johnson, 2002; Babai, 2016). Apart from some corner cases (Cai et al., 1992), the Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) test of graph isomorphism (Weisfeiler & Lehman, 1968) is an effective and computationally efficient test that distinguishes a broad class of graphs (Babai & Kucera, 1979). Its 1-dimensional form, “naïve vertex refinement”, is analogous to neighbor aggregation in GNNs. The WL test iteratively (1) aggregates the labels of nodes and their neighborhoods, and (2) hashes the aggregated labels into unique new labels. The algorithm decides that two graphs are non-isomorphic if at some iteration the labels of the nodes between the two graphs differ.
items.zh: Weisfeiler-Lehman 测试。图同构问题询问两个图是否拓扑相同。这是一个具有挑战性的问题：目前尚不知道有多项式时间算法（Garey，1979；Garey & Johnson，2002；Babai，2016）。除了一些边界情况（Cai 等人，1992），Weisfeiler-Lehman（WL）图同构测试（Weisfeiler & Lehman，1968）是一种有效且计算高效的测试，能够区分广泛的图（Babai & Kucera，1979）。其 1 维形式“朴素顶点细化”类似于 GNN 中的邻居聚合。WL 测试迭代地（1）聚合节点及其邻域的标签，以及（2）将聚合后的标签哈希为唯一的新标签。该算法判定两个图非同构，如果在某次迭代中两个图的节点标签不同。

items.en: Based on the WL test, Shervashidze et al. (2011) proposed the WL subtree kernel that measures the similarity between graphs. The kernel uses the counts of node labels at different iterations of the WL test as the feature vector of a graph. Intuitively, a node’s label at the k𝑘k-th iteration of WL test represents a subtree structure of height k𝑘k rooted at the node (Figure 1). Thus, the graph features considered by the WL subtree kernel are essentially counts of different rooted subtrees in the graph.
items.zh: 基于 WL 测试，Shervashidze 等人（2011）提出了 WL 子树核，用于衡量图之间的相似性。该核使用 WL 测试不同迭代中节点标签的计数作为图的特征向量。直观上，节点在 WL 测试第 k 次迭代的标签表示以该节点为根的高度为 k 的子树结构（图 1）。因此，WL 子树核考虑的图特征本质上是图中不同有根子树的计数。

items.capEn: Figure 1: An overview of our theoretical framework. Middle panel: rooted subtree structures (at the blue node) that the WL test uses to distinguish different graphs. Right panel: if a GNN’s aggregation function captures the full multiset of node neighbors, the GNN can capture the rooted subtrees in a recursive manner and be as powerful as the WL test.
items.capZh: 图1：我们理论框架的概述。中间面板：WL测试用于区分不同图的根子树结构（蓝色节点处）。右侧面板：如果GNN的聚合函数捕获了节点邻居的完整多重集，则GNN可以递归地捕获根子树，并与WL测试具有同等能力。

items.en: We start with an overview of our framework for analyzing the expressive power of GNNs. Figure 1 illustrates our idea. A GNN recursively updates each node’s feature vector to capture the network structure and features of other nodes around it, i.e., its rooted subtree structures (Figure 1). Throughout the paper, we assume node input features are from a countable universe. For finite graphs, node feature vectors at deeper layers of any fixed model are also from a countable universe. For notational simplicity, we can assign each feature vector a unique label in {a,b,c​…}𝑎𝑏𝑐…\{a,b,c\ldots\}. Then, feature vectors of a set of neighboring nodes form a multiset (Figure 1): the same element can appear multiple times since different nodes can have identical feature vectors.
items.zh: 我们首先概述分析GNN表达能力的框架。图1展示了我们的思路。GNN递归地更新每个节点的特征向量，以捕获其周围其他节点的网络结构和特征，即其根子树结构（图1）。在本文中，我们假设节点输入特征来自可数全集。对于有限图，任何固定模型更深层的节点特征向量也来自可数全集。为简化符号，我们可以为每个特征向量分配一个唯一标签，例如{a,b,c…}。那么，一组相邻节点的特征向量形成一个多重集（图1）：同一元素可能出现多次，因为不同节点可能具有相同的特征向量。

items.en: A multiset is a generalized concept of a set that allows multiple instances for its elements. More formally, a multiset is a 2-tuple X=(S,m)𝑋𝑆𝑚X=(S,m) where S𝑆S is the underlying set of X𝑋X that is formed from its distinct elements, and m:S→ℕ≥1:𝑚→𝑆subscriptℕabsent1m:S\rightarrow\mathbb{N}_{\geq 1} gives the multiplicity of the elements.
items.zh: 多重集是集合概念的推广，允许元素有多个实例。更正式地，多重集是一个二元组X=(S,m)，其中S是X的底层集合，由不同元素构成，m:S→ℕ≥1给出元素的重数。

items.en: To study the representational power of a GNN, we analyze when a GNN maps two nodes to the same location in the embedding space. Intuitively, a maximally powerful GNN maps two nodes to the same location only if they have identical subtree structures with identical features on the corresponding nodes. Since subtree structures are defined recursively via node neighborhoods (Figure 1), we can reduce our analysis to the question whether a GNN maps two neighborhoods (i.e., two multisets) to the same embedding or representation. A maximally powerful GNN would never map two different neighborhoods, i.e., multisets of feature vectors, to the same representation. This means its aggregation scheme must be injective. Thus, we abstract a GNN’s aggregation scheme as a class of functions over multisets that their neural networks can represent, and analyze whether they are able to represent injective multiset functions.
items.zh: 为了研究GNN的表征能力，我们分析GNN何时将两个节点映射到嵌入空间中的同一位置。直观上，一个最大能力的GNN仅当两个节点具有相同的子树结构且对应节点上特征相同时，才将它们映射到同一位置。由于子树结构通过节点邻域递归定义（图1），我们可以将分析简化为GNN是否将两个邻域（即两个多重集）映射到同一嵌入或表示。最大能力的GNN永远不会将两个不同的邻域（即特征向量的多重集）映射到同一表示。这意味着其聚合方案必须是单射的。因此，我们将GNN的聚合方案抽象为其神经网络可表示的多重集函数类，并分析它们是否能表示单射的多重集函数。

items.en: Next, we use this reasoning to develop a maximally powerful GNN. In Section 5, we study popular GNN variants and see that their aggregation schemes are inherently not injective and thus less powerful, but that they can capture other interesting properties of graphs.
items.zh: 接下来，我们利用这一推理开发一个最大能力的GNN。在第5节中，我们研究流行的GNN变体，发现它们的聚合方案本质上不是单射的，因此能力较弱，但它们可以捕获图的其他有趣性质。

full.secZh: 4 构建强大的图神经网络

items.en: First, we characterize the maximum representational capacity of a general class of GNN-based models. Ideally, a maximally powerful GNN could distinguish different graph structures by mapping them to different representations in the embedding space. This ability to map any two different graphs to different embeddings, however, implies solving the challenging graph isomorphism problem. That is, we want isomorphic graphs to be mapped to the same representation and non-isomorphic ones to different representations. In our analysis, we characterize the representational capacity of GNNs via a slightly weaker criterion: a powerful heuristic called Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) graph isomorphism test, that is known to work well in general, with a few exceptions, e.g., regular graphs (Cai et al., 1992; Douglas, 2011; Evdokimov & Ponomarenko, 1999).
items.zh: 首先，我们刻画一般GNN模型的最大表征能力。理想情况下，最大能力的GNN可以通过将不同图结构映射到嵌入空间中的不同表示来区分它们。然而，将任意两个不同图映射到不同嵌入的能力意味着解决具有挑战性的图同构问题。即，我们希望同构图映射到相同表示，非同构图映射到不同表示。在我们的分析中，我们通过一个稍弱的标准来刻画GNN的表征能力：一个称为Weisfeiler-Lehman（WL）图同构测试的强大启发式方法，该方法通常表现良好，但存在少数例外，例如正则图（Cai等人，1992；Douglas，2011；Evdokimov & Ponomarenko，1999）。

items.en: Let G1subscript𝐺1G_{1} and G2subscript𝐺2G_{2} be any two non-isomorphic graphs. If a graph neural network 𝒜:𝒢→ℝd:𝒜→𝒢superscriptℝ𝑑\mathcal{A}:\mathcal{G}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}^{d} maps G1subscript𝐺1G_{1} and G2subscript𝐺2G_{2} to different embeddings, the Weisfeiler-Lehman graph isomorphism test also decides G1subscript𝐺1G_{1} and G2subscript𝐺2G_{2} are not isomorphic.
items.zh: 设G1和G2是任意两个非同构图。如果图神经网络A: G → ℝ^d将G1和G2映射到不同嵌入，则Weisfeiler-Lehman图同构测试也判定G1和G2非同构。

items.en: Proofs of all Lemmas and Theorems can be found in the Appendix. Hence, any aggregation-based GNN is at most as powerful as the WL test in distinguishing different graphs. A natural follow-up question is whether there exist GNNs that are, in principle, as powerful as the WL test? Our answer, in Theorem 3, is yes: if the neighbor aggregation and graph-level readout functions are injective, then the resulting GNN is as powerful as the WL test.
items.zh: 所有引理和定理的证明见附录。因此，任何基于聚合的GNN在区分不同图方面最多与WL测试能力相当。一个自然的后续问题是，是否存在原则上与WL测试能力相当的GNN？我们的答案是肯定的，如定理3所示：如果邻居聚合和图级读出函数是单射的，则所得GNN与WL测试能力相当。

items.en: Let 𝒜:𝒢→ℝd:𝒜→𝒢superscriptℝ𝑑\mathcal{A}:\mathcal{G}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}^{d} be a GNN. With a sufficient number of GNN layers, 𝒜𝒜\mathcal{A} maps any graphs G1subscript𝐺1G_{1} and G2subscript𝐺2G_{2} that the Weisfeiler-Lehman test of isomorphism decides as non-isomorphic, to different embeddings if the following conditions hold:

items.en: where the functions f𝑓f, which operates on multisets, and ϕitalic-ϕ\phi are injective.
items.zh: 其中作用于多重集的函数f和φ是单射的。

items.en: 𝒜𝒜\mathcal{A}’s graph-level readout, which operates on the multiset of node features {hv(k)}superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑘\left\{h_{v}^{(k)}\right\}, is injective.
items.zh: A的图级读出函数，作用于节点特征的多重集{h_v^(k)}，是单射的。

items.en: We prove Theorem 3 in the appendix. For countable sets, injectiveness well characterizes whether a function preserves the distinctness of inputs. Uncountable sets, where node features are continuous, need some further considerations. In addition, it would be interesting to characterize how close together the learned features lie in a function’s image. We leave these questions for future work, and focus on the case where input node features are from a countable set (that can be a subset of an uncountable set such as ℝnsuperscriptℝ𝑛\mathbb{R}^{n}).
items.zh: 我们在附录中证明定理3。对于可数集，单射性很好地刻画了函数是否保持输入的区分性。不可数集（其中节点特征是连续的）需要进一步考虑。此外，刻画学习到的特征在函数像中的接近程度也很有趣。我们将这些问题留待未来工作，并专注于输入节点特征来自可数集（可以是不可数集如ℝ^n的子集）的情况。

items.en: Assume the input feature space 𝒳𝒳\mathcal{X} is countable. Let g(k)superscript𝑔𝑘g^{(k)} be the function parameterized by a GNN’s k𝑘k-th layer for k=1,…,L𝑘1…𝐿k=1,...,L, where g(1)superscript𝑔1g^{(1)} is defined on multisets X⊂𝒳𝑋𝒳X\subset\mathcal{X} of bounded size. The range of g(k)superscript𝑔𝑘g^{(k)}, i.e., the space of node hidden features hv(k)superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑘h_{v}^{(k)}, is also countable for all k=1,…,L𝑘1…𝐿k=1,...,L.
items.zh: 假设输入特征空间X是可数的。设g^(k)是由GNN第k层参数化的函数，k=1,…,L，其中g^(1)定义在有界大小的多重集X⊂X上。g^(k)的值域，即节点隐藏特征h_v^(k)的空间，对于所有k=1,…,L也是可数的。

items.en: Here, it is also worth discussing an important benefit of GNNs beyond distinguishing different graphs, that is, capturing similarity of graph structures. Note that node feature vectors in the WL test are essentially one-hot encodings and thus cannot capture the similarity between subtrees. In contrast, a GNN satisfying the criteria in Theorem 3 generalizes the WL test by learning to embed the subtrees to low-dimensional space. This enables GNNs to not only discriminate different structures, but also to learn to map similar graph structures to similar embeddings and capture dependencies between graph structures. Capturing structural similarity of the node labels is shown to be helpful for generalization particularly when the co-occurrence of subtrees is sparse across different graphs or there are noisy edges and node features (Yanardag & Vishwanathan, 2015).
items.zh: 在此，还值得讨论GNN超越区分不同图的一个重要好处，即捕获图结构的相似性。注意，WL测试中的节点特征向量本质上是独热编码，因此无法捕获子树之间的相似性。相比之下，满足定理3条件的GNN通过学习将子树嵌入到低维空间来推广WL测试。这使得GNN不仅能区分不同结构，还能学习将相似图结构映射到相似嵌入，并捕获图结构之间的依赖关系。捕获节点标签的结构相似性已被证明有助于泛化，特别是在不同图中子树共现稀疏或存在噪声边和节点特征时（Yanardag & Vishwanathan，2015）。

items.en: Having developed conditions for a maximally powerful GNN, we next develop a simple architecture, Graph Isomorphism Network (GIN), that provably satisfies the conditions in Theorem 3. This model generalizes the WL test and hence achieves maximum discriminative power among GNNs.
items.zh: 在开发了最大能力GNN的条件后，我们接下来开发一个简单的架构——图同构网络（GIN），它可证明满足定理3的条件。该模型推广了WL测试，从而在GNN中实现了最大的判别能力。

items.en: To model injective multiset functions for the neighbor aggregation, we develop a theory of “deep multisets”, i.e., parameterizing universal multiset functions with neural networks. Our next lemma states that sum aggregators can represent injective, in fact, universal functions over multisets.
items.zh: 为了对邻居聚合建模单射多重集函数，我们发展了一个“深度多重集”理论，即用神经网络参数化通用多重集函数。我们的下一个引理指出，求和聚合器可以表示单射的，实际上是通用的多重集函数。

items.en: Assume 𝒳𝒳\mathcal{X} is countable. There exists a function f:𝒳→ℝn:𝑓→𝒳superscriptℝ𝑛f:\mathcal{X}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}^{n} so that h​(X)=∑x∈Xf​(x)ℎ𝑋subscript𝑥𝑋𝑓𝑥h(X)=\sum_{x\in X}f(x) is unique for each multiset X⊂𝒳𝑋𝒳X\subset\mathcal{X} of bounded size. Moreover, any multiset function g𝑔g can be decomposed as g​(X)=ϕ​(∑x∈Xf​(x))𝑔𝑋italic-ϕsubscript𝑥𝑋𝑓𝑥g\left(X\right)=\phi\left(\sum_{x\in X}f(x)\right) for some function ϕitalic-ϕ\phi.
items.zh: 假设X是可数的。存在一个函数f: X → ℝ^n，使得h(X)=∑_{x∈X} f(x)对于每个有界大小的多重集X⊂X是唯一的。此外，任何多重集函数g可以分解为g(X)=φ(∑_{x∈X} f(x))，其中φ是某个函数。

items.en: We prove Lemma 5 in the appendix. The proof extends the setting in (Zaheer et al., 2017) from sets to multisets. An important distinction between deep multisets and sets is that certain popular injective set functions, such as the mean aggregator, are not injective multiset functions. With the mechanism for modeling universal multiset functions in Lemma 5 as a building block, we can conceive aggregation schemes that can represent universal functions over a node and the multiset of its neighbors, and thus will satisfy the injectiveness condition (a) in Theorem 3. Our next corollary provides a simple and concrete formulation among many such aggregation schemes.
items.zh: 我们在附录中证明引理5。该证明将（Zaheer等人，2017）中的设置从集合扩展到多重集。深度多重集与集合的一个重要区别是，某些流行的单射集合函数（如均值聚合器）不是单射的多重集函数。利用引理5中建模通用多重集函数的机制作为构建块，我们可以设计出能够表示节点及其邻居多重集上的通用函数的聚合方案，从而满足定理3中的单射性条件（a）。我们的下一个推论在许多此类聚合方案中提供了一个简单而具体的公式。

items.en: Assume 𝒳𝒳\mathcal{X} is countable. There exists a function f:𝒳→ℝn:𝑓→𝒳superscriptℝ𝑛f:\mathcal{X}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}^{n} so that for infinitely many choices of ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, including all irrational numbers, h​(c,X)=(1+ϵ)⋅f​(c)+∑x∈Xf​(x)ℎ𝑐𝑋⋅1italic-ϵ𝑓𝑐subscript𝑥𝑋𝑓𝑥h(c,X)=(1+\epsilon)\cdot f(c)+\sum_{x\in X}f(x) is unique for each pair (c,X)𝑐𝑋(c,X), where c∈𝒳𝑐𝒳c\in\mathcal{X} and X⊂𝒳𝑋𝒳X\subset\mathcal{X} is a multiset of bounded size. Moreover, any function g𝑔g over such pairs can be decomposed as g​(c,X)=φ​((1+ϵ)⋅f​(c)+∑x∈Xf​(x))𝑔𝑐𝑋𝜑⋅1italic-ϵ𝑓𝑐subscript𝑥𝑋𝑓𝑥g\left(c,X\right)=\varphi\left(\left(1+\epsilon\right)\cdot f(c)+\sum_{x\in X}f(x)\right) for some function φ𝜑\varphi.
items.zh: 假设X是可数的。存在一个函数f: X → ℝ^n，使得对于无穷多个ϵ的选择（包括所有无理数），h(c,X)=(1+ϵ)·f(c)+∑_{x∈X} f(x)对于每个对(c,X)是唯一的，其中c∈X，X⊂X是有界大小的多重集。此外，任何关于此类对的函数g可以分解为g(c,X)=φ((1+ϵ)·f(c)+∑_{x∈X} f(x))，其中φ是某个函数。

items.en: We can use multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) to model and learn f𝑓f and φ𝜑\varphi in Corollary 6, thanks to the universal approximation theorem (Hornik et al., 1989; Hornik, 1991). In practice, we model f(k+1)∘φ(k)superscript𝑓𝑘1superscript𝜑𝑘f^{(k+1)}\circ\varphi^{(k)} with one MLP, because MLPs can represent the composition of functions. In the first iteration, we do not need MLPs before summation if input features are one-hot encodings as their summation alone is injective. We can make ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon a learnable parameter or a fixed scalar. Then, GIN updates node representations as
items.zh: 由于通用近似定理（Hornik et al., 1989; Hornik, 1991），我们可以使用多层感知机（MLP）来建模和学习推论6中的f和φ。实践中，我们用一个MLP建模f^{(k+1)}∘φ^{(k)}，因为MLP可以表示函数的复合。在第一次迭代中，如果输入特征是独热编码，则求和本身是单射的，因此我们不需要在求和前使用MLP。我们可以将ϵ设为可学习参数或固定标量。然后，GIN按如下方式更新节点表示：

items.en: Generally, there may exist many other powerful GNNs. GIN is one such example among many maximally powerful GNNs, while being simple.
items.zh: 一般来说，可能存在许多其他强大的GNN。GIN是众多最大能力GNN中的一个例子，同时保持简单。

items.en: Node embeddings learned by GIN can be directly used for tasks like node classification and link prediction. For graph classification tasks we propose the following “readout” function that, given embeddings of individual nodes, produces the embedding of the entire graph.
items.zh: GIN学习的节点嵌入可直接用于节点分类和链接预测等任务。对于图分类任务，我们提出以下“读出”函数，该函数给定单个节点的嵌入，生成整个图的嵌入。

items.en: An important aspect of the graph-level readout is that node representations, corresponding to subtree structures, get more refined and global as the number of iterations increases. A sufficient number of iterations is key to achieving good discriminative power. Yet, features from earlier iterations may sometimes generalize better. To consider all structural information, we use information from all depths/iterations of the model. We achieve this by an architecture similar to Jumping Knowledge Networks (Xu et al., 2018), where we replace Eq. 2.4 with graph representations concatenated across all iterations/layers of GIN:
items.zh: 图级读出的一个重要方面是，节点表示（对应于子树结构）随着迭代次数的增加而变得更加精细和全局化。足够的迭代次数是实现良好判别能力的关键。然而，早期迭代的特征有时可能泛化得更好。为了考虑所有结构信息，我们使用模型所有深度/迭代的信息。我们通过类似于跳跃知识网络（Xu et al., 2018）的架构实现这一点，其中我们将公式2.4替换为跨GIN所有迭代/层拼接的图表示：

items.en: By Theorem 3 and Corollary 6, if GIN replaces READOUT in Eq. 4.2 with summing all node features from the same iterations (we do not need an extra MLP before summation for the same reason as in Eq. 4.1), it provably generalizes the WL test and the WL subtree kernel.
items.zh: 根据定理3和推论6，如果GIN将公式4.2中的READOUT替换为对同一迭代的所有节点特征求和（出于与公式4.1相同的原因，我们不需要在求和前使用额外的MLP），则它可证明地推广了WL测试和WL子树核。

full.sec: 5 Less powerful but still interesting GNNs
full.secZh: 5 能力较弱但仍有意义的GNN

items.capEn: Figure 2: Ranking by expressive power for sum, mean and max aggregators over a multiset. Left panel shows the input multiset, i.e., the network neighborhood to be aggregated. The next three panels illustrate the aspects of the multiset a given aggregator is able to capture: sum captures the full multiset, mean captures the proportion/distribution of elements of a given type, and the max aggregator ignores multiplicities (reduces the multiset to a simple set).
items.capZh: 图2：对多重集使用求和、均值和最大聚合器的表达能力排名。左图显示输入多重集，即要聚合的网络邻域。接下来的三个面板说明了给定聚合器能够捕获的多重集的方面：求和捕获完整的多重集，均值捕获给定类型元素的比例/分布，而最大聚合器忽略多重性（将多重集简化为简单集合）。

items.en: Next, we study GNNs that do not satisfy the conditions in Theorem 3, including GCN (Kipf & Welling, 2017) and GraphSAGE (Hamilton et al., 2017a). We conduct ablation studies on two aspects of the aggregator in Eq. 4.1: (1) 1-layer perceptrons instead of MLPs and (2) mean or max-pooling instead of the sum. We will see that these GNN variants get confused by surprisingly simple graphs and are less powerful than the WL test. Nonetheless, models with mean aggregators like GCN perform well for node classification tasks. To better understand this, we precisely characterize what different GNN variants can and cannot capture about a graph and discuss the implications for learning with graphs.
items.zh: 接下来，我们研究不满足定理3条件的GNN，包括GCN（Kipf & Welling, 2017）和GraphSAGE（Hamilton et al., 2017a）。我们对公式4.1中聚合器的两个方面进行消融研究：（1）使用1层感知机代替MLP；（2）使用均值或最大池化代替求和。我们将看到，这些GNN变体被异常简单的图混淆，且能力弱于WL测试。尽管如此，像GCN这样使用均值聚合器的模型在节点分类任务上表现良好。为了更好地理解这一点，我们精确刻画了不同GNN变体能够和不能捕获图的哪些方面，并讨论了对图学习的影响。

items.en: The function f𝑓f in Lemma 5 helps map distinct multisets to unique embeddings. It can be parameterized by an MLP by the universal approximation theorem (Hornik, 1991). Nonetheless, many existing GNNs instead use a 1-layer perceptron σ∘W𝜎𝑊\sigma\circ W (Duvenaud et al., 2015; Kipf & Welling, 2017; Zhang et al., 2018), a linear mapping followed by a non-linear activation function such as a ReLU. Such 1-layer mappings are examples of Generalized Linear Models (Nelder & Wedderburn, 1972). Therefore, we are interested in understanding whether 1-layer perceptrons are enough for graph learning. Lemma 7 suggests that there are indeed network neighborhoods (multisets) that models with 1-layer perceptrons can never distinguish.
items.zh: 引理5中的函数f有助于将不同的多重集映射到唯一的嵌入。根据通用近似定理（Hornik, 1991），它可以通过MLP参数化。然而，许多现有的GNN使用1层感知机σ∘W（Duvenaud et al., 2015; Kipf & Welling, 2017; Zhang et al., 2018），即线性映射后接非线性激活函数（如ReLU）。这种1层映射是广义线性模型（Nelder & Wedderburn, 1972）的例子。因此，我们有兴趣了解1层感知机是否足以用于图学习。引理7表明，确实存在一些网络邻域（多重集），使用1层感知机的模型永远无法区分。

items.zh: 存在有限多重集X1≠X2，使得对于任何线性映射W，∑_{x∈X1} ReLU(Wx) = ∑_{x∈X2} ReLU(Wx)。

items.en: The main idea of the proof for Lemma 7 is that 1-layer perceptrons can behave much like linear mappings, so the GNN layers degenerate into simply summing over neighborhood features. Our proof builds on the fact that the bias term is lacking in the linear mapping. With the bias term and sufficiently large output dimensionality, 1-layer perceptrons might be able to distinguish different multisets. Nonetheless, unlike models using MLPs, the 1-layer perceptron (even with the bias term) is not a universal approximator of multiset functions. Consequently, even if GNNs with 1-layer perceptrons can embed different graphs to different locations to some degree, such embeddings may not adequately capture structural similarity, and can be difficult for simple classifiers, e.g., linear classifiers, to fit. In Section 7, we will empirically see that GNNs with 111-layer perceptrons, when applied to graph classification, sometimes severely underfit training data and often perform worse than GNNs with MLPs in terms of test accuracy.
items.zh: 引理7证明的主要思想是，1层感知机的行为类似于线性映射，因此GNN层退化为简单地对邻域特征求和。我们的证明基于线性映射中缺少偏置项这一事实。有了偏置项和足够大的输出维度，1层感知机或许能够区分不同的多重集。然而，与使用MLP的模型不同，1层感知机（即使有偏置项）不是多重集函数的通用近似器。因此，即使使用1层感知机的GNN可以在一定程度上将不同图嵌入到不同位置，这种嵌入可能无法充分捕获结构相似性，并且可能难以被简单分类器（如线性分类器）拟合。在第7节中，我们将通过实验看到，使用1层感知机的GNN在应用于图分类时，有时会严重欠拟合训练数据，并且在测试准确率上通常比使用MLP的GNN表现更差。

full.sec: 5.2 Structures that confuse mean and max-pooling
full.secZh: 5.2 混淆均值与最大池化的结构

items.en: What happens if we replace the sum in h​(X)=∑x∈Xf​(x)ℎ𝑋subscript𝑥𝑋𝑓𝑥h\left(X\right)=\sum_{x\in X}f(x) with mean or max-pooling as in GCN and GraphSAGE? Mean and max-pooling aggregators are still well-defined multiset functions because they are permutation invariant. But, they are not injective. Figure 2 ranks the three aggregators by their representational power, and Figure 3 illustrates pairs of structures that the mean and max-pooling aggregators fail to distinguish. Here, node colors denote different node features, and we assume the GNNs aggregate neighbors first before combining them with the central node labeled as v𝑣v and v′superscript𝑣′v^{\prime}.
items.zh: 如果我们将h(X)=∑_{x∈X} f(x)中的求和替换为GCN和GraphSAGE中使用的均值或最大池化，会发生什么？均值和最大池化聚合器仍然是定义良好的多重集函数，因为它们具有置换不变性。但它们不是单射的。图2按表示能力对三种聚合器进行了排名，图3展示了均值和最大池化聚合器无法区分的结构对。这里，节点颜色表示不同的节点特征，我们假设GNN先聚合邻居，然后将其与标记为v和v'的中心节点结合。

items.en: In Figure 3(a), every node has the same feature a𝑎a and f​(a)𝑓𝑎f(a) is the same across all nodes (for any function f𝑓f). When performing neighborhood aggregation, the mean or maximum over f​(a)𝑓𝑎f(a) remains f​(a)𝑓𝑎f(a) and, by induction, we always obtain the same node representation everywhere. Thus, in this case mean and max-pooling aggregators fail to capture any structural information. In contrast, the sum aggregator distinguishes the structures because 2⋅f​(a)⋅2𝑓𝑎2\cdot f(a) and 3⋅f​(a)⋅3𝑓𝑎3\cdot f(a) give different values. The same argument can be applied to any unlabeled graph. If node degrees instead of a constant value is used as node input features, in principle, mean can recover sum, but max-pooling cannot.
items.zh: 在图3(a)中，每个节点具有相同的特征a，并且f(a)在所有节点上相同（对于任何函数f）。在执行邻域聚合时，f(a)的均值或最大值仍然是f(a)，并且通过归纳，我们总是在任何地方获得相同的节点表示。因此，在这种情况下，均值和最大池化聚合器无法捕获任何结构信息。相反，求和聚合器区分了这些结构，因为2·f(a)和3·f(a)给出不同的值。同样的论点可以应用于任何无标签图。如果使用节点度而不是常数值作为节点输入特征，原则上均值可以恢复求和，但最大池化不能。

items.en: Fig. 3(a) suggests that mean and max have trouble distinguishing graphs with nodes that have repeating features. Let hcolorsubscriptℎcolorh_{{\rm color}} (r𝑟r for red, g𝑔g for green) denote node features transformed by f𝑓f. Fig. 3(b) shows that maximum over the neighborhood of the blue nodes v𝑣v and v′superscript𝑣′v^{\prime} yields max⁡(hg,hr)subscriptℎgsubscriptℎr\max\left(h_{\text{g}},h_{\text{r}}\right) and max⁡(hg,hr,hr)subscriptℎgsubscriptℎrsubscriptℎr\max\left(h_{\text{g}},h_{\text{r}},h_{\text{r}}\right), which collapse to the same representation (even though the corresponding graph structures are different). Thus, max-pooling fails to distinguish them. In contrast, the sum aggregator still works because 12​(hg+hr)12subscriptℎgsubscriptℎr\frac{1}{2}\left(h_{\text{g}}+h_{\text{r}}\right) and 13​(hg+hr+hr)13subscriptℎgsubscriptℎrsubscriptℎr\frac{1}{3}\left(h_{\text{g}}+h_{\text{r}}+h_{\text{r}}\right) are in general not equivalent. Similarly, in Fig. 3(c), both mean and max fail as 12​(hg+hr)=14​(hg+hg+hr+hr)12subscriptℎgsubscriptℎr14subscriptℎgsubscriptℎgsubscriptℎrsubscriptℎr\frac{1}{2}\left(h_{\text{g}}+h_{\text{r}}\right)=\frac{1}{4}\left(h_{\text{g}}+h_{\text{g}}+h_{\text{r}}+h_{\text{r}}\right).
items.zh: 图3(a)表明均值和最大值难以区分具有重复特征的节点的图。令h_color（r表示红色，g表示绿色）表示由f变换后的节点特征。图3(b)显示，蓝色节点v和v'的邻域上的最大值分别产生max(h_g, h_r)和max(h_g, h_r, h_r)，它们坍缩为相同的表示（即使相应的图结构不同）。因此，最大池化无法区分它们。相反，求和聚合器仍然有效，因为1/2(h_g+h_r)和1/3(h_g+h_r+h_r)通常不等价。类似地，在图3(c)中，均值和最大值都失败，因为1/2(h_g+h_r)=1/4(h_g+h_g+h_r+h_r)。

items.en: To characterize the class of multisets that the mean aggregator can distinguish, consider the example X1=(S,m)subscript𝑋1𝑆𝑚X_{1}=(S,m) and X2=(S,k⋅m)subscript𝑋2𝑆⋅𝑘𝑚X_{2}=(S,k\cdot m), where X1subscript𝑋1X_{1} and X2subscript𝑋2X_{2} have the same set of distinct elements, but X2subscript𝑋2X_{2} contains k𝑘k copies of each element of X1subscript𝑋1X_{1}. Any mean aggregator maps X1subscript𝑋1X_{1} and X2subscript𝑋2X_{2} to the same embedding, because it simply takes averages over individual element features. Thus, the mean captures the distribution (proportions) of elements in a multiset, but not the exact multiset.
items.zh: 为了刻画均值聚合器能够区分的多重集类别，考虑示例X1=(S,m)和X2=(S,k·m)，其中X1和X2具有相同的不同元素集合，但X2包含X1每个元素的k个副本。任何均值聚合器都将X1和X2映射到相同的嵌入，因为它只是对单个元素特征取平均值。因此，均值捕获了多重集中元素的分布（比例），而不是精确的多重集。

items.en: Assume 𝒳𝒳\mathcal{X} is countable. There exists a function f:𝒳→ℝn:𝑓→𝒳superscriptℝ𝑛f:\mathcal{X}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}^{n} so that for h​(X)=1|X|​∑x∈Xf​(x)ℎ𝑋1𝑋subscript𝑥𝑋𝑓𝑥h(X)=\frac{1}{|X|}\sum_{x\in X}f(x), h​(X1)=h​(X2)ℎsubscript𝑋1ℎsubscript𝑋2h(X_{1})=h(X_{2}) if and only if multisets X1subscript𝑋1X_{1} and X2subscript𝑋2X_{2} have the same distribution. That is, assuming |X2|≥|X1|subscript𝑋2subscript𝑋1|X_{2}|\geq|X_{1}|, we have X1=(S,m)subscript𝑋1𝑆𝑚X_{1}=(S,m) and X2=(S,k⋅m)subscript𝑋2𝑆⋅𝑘𝑚X_{2}=(S,k\cdot m) for some k∈ℕ≥1𝑘subscriptℕabsent1k\in\mathbb{N}_{\geq 1}.
items.zh: 假设𝒳是可数的。存在函数f: 𝒳→ℝ^n，使得对于h(X)=1/|X|∑_{x∈X} f(x)，h(X1)=h(X2)当且仅当多重集X1和X2具有相同的分布。即，假设|X2|≥|X1|，我们有X1=(S,m)和X2=(S,k·m)对于某个k∈ℕ_{≥1}。

items.en: The mean aggregator may perform well if, for the task, the statistical and distributional information in the graph is more important than the exact structure. Moreover, when node features are diverse and rarely repeat, the mean aggregator is as powerful as the sum aggregator. This may explain why, despite the limitations identified in Section 5.2, GNNs with mean aggregators are effective for node classification tasks, such as classifying article subjects and community detection, where node features are rich and the distribution of the neighborhood features provides a strong signal for the task.
items.zh: 如果对于任务而言，图中的统计和分布信息比精确结构更重要，那么均值聚合器可能表现良好。此外，当节点特征多样且很少重复时，均值聚合器与求和聚合器一样强大。这可能解释了为什么尽管第5.2节中指出了局限性，但使用均值聚合器的GNN在节点分类任务（如分类文章主题和社区检测）中仍然有效，因为在这些任务中节点特征丰富，且邻域特征的分布为任务提供了强信号。

full.sec: 5.4 Max-pooling learns sets with distinct elements
full.secZh: 5.4 最大池化学习具有不同元素的集合

items.en: The examples in Figure 3 illustrate that max-pooling considers multiple nodes with the same feature as only one node (i.e., treats a multiset as a set). Max-pooling captures neither the exact structure nor the distribution. However, it may be suitable for tasks where it is important to identify representative elements or the “skeleton”, rather than to distinguish the exact structure or distribution. Qi et al. (2017) empirically show that the max-pooling aggregator learns to identify the skeleton of a 3D point cloud and that it is robust to noise and outliers. For completeness, the next corollary shows that the max-pooling aggregator captures the underlying set of a multiset.
items.zh: 图3中的示例说明，最大池化将具有相同特征的多个节点视为一个节点（即将多重集视为集合）。最大池化既不能捕获精确结构，也不能捕获分布。然而，它可能适用于需要识别代表性元素或“骨架”的任务，而不是区分精确结构或分布。Qi等人（2017）通过实验表明，最大池化聚合器学习识别3D点云的骨架，并且对噪声和异常值具有鲁棒性。为完整起见，以下推论表明最大池化聚合器捕获了多重集的底层集合。

items.en: Assume 𝒳𝒳\mathcal{X} is countable. Then there exists a function f:𝒳→ℝ∞:𝑓→𝒳superscriptℝf:\mathcal{X}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}^{\infty} so that for h​(X)=maxx∈X⁡f​(x)ℎ𝑋subscript𝑥𝑋𝑓𝑥h(X)=\max_{x\in X}f(x), h​(X1)=h​(X2)ℎsubscript𝑋1ℎsubscript𝑋2h(X_{1})=h(X_{2}) if and only if X1subscript𝑋1X_{1} and X2subscript𝑋2X_{2} have the same underlying set.
items.zh: 假设 𝒳 是可数的。那么存在一个函数 f: 𝒳 → ℝ^∞，使得对于 h(X) = max_{x∈X} f(x)，h(X₁) = h(X₂) 当且仅当 X₁ 和 X₂ 具有相同的底层集合。

full.secZh: 5.5 关于其他聚合器的评注

items.en: There are other non-standard neighbor aggregation schemes that we do not cover, e.g., weighted average via attention (Velickovic et al., 2018) and LSTM pooling (Hamilton et al., 2017a; Murphy et al., 2018). We emphasize that our theoretical framework is general enough to characterize the representaional power of any aggregation-based GNNs. In the future, it would be interesting to apply our framework to analyze and understand other aggregation schemes.
items.zh: 还有其他非标准的邻居聚合方案我们未涉及，例如通过注意力机制的加权平均（Velickovic 等人，2018）和 LSTM 池化（Hamilton 等人，2017a；Murphy 等人，2018）。我们强调，我们的理论框架足够通用，可以刻画任何基于聚合的 GNN 的表征能力。未来，应用我们的框架来分析和理解其他聚合方案将是有趣的。

items.en: Despite the empirical success of GNNs, there has been relatively little work that mathematically studies their properties. An exception to this is the work of Scarselli et al. (2009a) who shows that the perhaps earliest GNN model (Scarselli et al., 2009b) can approximate measurable functions in probability. Lei et al. (2017) show that their proposed architecture lies in the RKHS of graph kernels, but do not study explicitly which graphs it can distinguish. Each of these works focuses on a specific architecture and do not easily generalize to multple architectures. In contrast, our results above provide a general framework for analyzing and characterizing the expressive power of a broad class of GNNs. Recently, many GNN-based architectures have been proposed, including sum aggregation and MLP encoding (Battaglia et al., 2016; Scarselli et al., 2009b; Duvenaud et al., 2015), and most without theoretical derivation. In contrast to many prior GNN architectures, our Graph Isomorphism Network (GIN) is theoretically motivated, simple yet powerful.
items.zh: 尽管 GNN 取得了经验上的成功，但对其性质进行数学研究的工作相对较少。一个例外是 Scarselli 等人（2009a）的工作，他们表明可能是最早的 GNN 模型（Scarselli 等人，2009b）可以在概率上逼近可测函数。Lei 等人（2017）表明他们提出的架构位于图核的 RKHS 中，但没有明确研究它能区分哪些图。这些工作都专注于特定架构，不易推广到多种架构。相比之下，我们的结果为分析和刻画一大类 GNN 的表达能力提供了一个通用框架。最近，许多基于 GNN 的架构被提出，包括求和聚合和 MLP 编码（Battaglia 等人，2016；Scarselli 等人，2009b；Duvenaud 等人，2015），且大多没有理论推导。与许多先前的 GNN 架构相比，我们的图同构网络（GIN）具有理论动机，简单而强大。

items.en: We evaluate and compare the training and test performance of GIN and less powerful GNN variants.111The code is available at https://github.com/weihua916/powerful-gnns. Training set performance allows us to compare different GNN models based on their representational power and test set performance quantifies generalization ability.
items.zh: 我们评估并比较了 GIN 和较弱 GNN 变体的训练和测试性能。¹¹ 代码可在 https://github.com/weihua916/powerful-gnns 获取。训练集性能允许我们根据表征能力比较不同的 GNN 模型，测试集性能则量化了泛化能力。

items.en: Datasets. We use 9 graph classification benchmarks: 4 bioinformatics datasets (MUTAG, PTC, NCI1, PROTEINS) and 5 social network datasets (COLLAB, IMDB-BINARY, IMDB-MULTI, REDDIT-BINARY and REDDIT-MULTI5K) (Yanardag & Vishwanathan, 2015). Importantly, our goal here is not to allow the models to rely on the input node features but mainly learn from the network structure. Thus, in the bioinformatic graphs, the nodes have categorical input features but in the social networks, they have no features. For social networks we create node features as follows: for the REDDIT datasets, we set all node feature vectors to be the same (thus, features here are uninformative); for the other social graphs, we use one-hot encodings of node degrees. Dataset statistics are summarized in Table 1, and more details of the data can be found in Appendix I.
items.zh: 数据集。我们使用了 9 个图分类基准：4 个生物信息学数据集（MUTAG、PTC、NCI1、PROTEINS）和 5 个社交网络数据集（COLLAB、IMDB-BINARY、IMDB-MULTI、REDDIT-BINARY 和 REDDIT-MULTI5K）（Yanardag & Vishwanathan, 2015）。重要的是，我们的目标不是让模型依赖输入节点特征，而是主要从网络结构中学习。因此，在生物信息学图中，节点具有分类输入特征，但在社交网络中，它们没有特征。对于社交网络，我们按如下方式创建节点特征：对于 REDDIT 数据集，我们将所有节点特征向量设置为相同（因此这里的特征无信息）；对于其他社交图，我们使用节点度数的独热编码。数据集统计信息总结在表 1 中，更多数据细节见附录 I。

items.en: Models and configurations. We evaluate GINs (Eqs. 4.1 and 4.2) and the less powerful GNN variants. Under the GIN framework, we consider two variants: (1) a GIN that learns ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon in Eq. 4.1 by gradient descent, which we call GIN-ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, and (2) a simpler (slightly less powerful)222There exist certain (somewhat contrived) graphs that GIN-ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon can distinguish but GIN-0 cannot. GIN, where ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon in Eq. 4.1 is fixed to 0, which we call GIN-0. As we will see, GIN-0 shows strong empirical performance: not only does GIN-0 fit training data equally well as GIN-ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, it also demonstrates good generalization, slightly but consistently outperforming GIN-ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon in terms of test accuracy. For the less powerful GNN variants, we consider architectures that replace the sum in the GIN-0 aggregation with mean or max-pooling333For REDDIT-BINARY, REDDIT–MULTI5K, and COLLAB, we did not run experiments for max-pooling due to GPU memory constraints., or replace MLPs with 1-layer perceptrons, i.e., a linear mapping followed by ReLU. In Figure 4 and Table 1, a model is named by the aggregator/perceptron it uses. Here mean–1-layer and max–1-layer correspond to GCN and GraphSAGE, respectively, up to minor architecture modifications. We apply the same graph-level readout (READOUT in Eq. 4.2) for GINs and all the GNN variants, specifically, sum readout on bioinformatics datasets and mean readout on social datasets due to better test performance.
items.zh: 模型和配置。我们评估了 GIN（公式 4.1 和 4.2）以及较弱的 GNN 变体。在 GIN 框架下，我们考虑两种变体：（1）通过梯度下降学习公式 4.1 中 ε 的 GIN，称为 GIN-ε；（2）一个更简单（稍弱）²² 的 GIN，其中公式 4.1 中的 ε 固定为 0，称为 GIN-0。正如我们将看到的，GIN-0 表现出强大的经验性能：不仅 GIN-0 与 GIN-ε 一样能很好地拟合训练数据，而且它还表现出良好的泛化能力，在测试准确率上略微但持续优于 GIN-ε。对于较弱的 GNN 变体，我们考虑将 GIN-0 聚合中的求和替换为均值或最大池化³³，或将 MLP 替换为 1 层感知器（即线性映射后接 ReLU）的架构。在图 4 和表 1 中，模型以其使用的聚合器/感知器命名。这里 mean–1-layer 和 max–1-layer 分别对应 GCN 和 GraphSAGE，仅架构有微小修改。我们对 GIN 和所有 GNN 变体应用相同的图级读出（公式 4.2 中的 READOUT），具体地，在生物信息学数据集上使用求和读出，在社交数据集上使用均值读出，因为后者测试性能更好。

items.en: Following (Yanardag & Vishwanathan, 2015; Niepert et al., 2016), we perform 10-fold cross-validation with LIB-SVM (Chang & Lin, 2011). We report the average and standard deviation of validation accuracies across the 10 folds within the cross-validation. For all configurations, 5 GNN layers (including the input layer) are applied, and all MLPs have 222 layers. Batch normalization (Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015) is applied on every hidden layer. We use the Adam optimizer (Kingma & Ba, 2015) with initial learning rate 0.010.010.01 and decay the learning rate by 0.50.50.5 every 50 epochs. The hyper-parameters we tune for each dataset are: (1) the number of hidden units ∈{16,32}absent1632\in\{16,32\} for bioinformatics graphs and 646464 for social graphs; (2) the batch size ∈{32,128}absent32128\in\{32,128\}; (3) the dropout ratio ∈{0,0.5}absent00.5\in\{0,0.5\} after the dense layer (Srivastava et al., 2014); (4) the number of epochs, i.e., a single epoch with the best cross-validation accuracy averaged over the 10 folds was selected. Note that due to the small dataset sizes, an alternative setting, where hyper-parameter selection is done using a validation set, is extremely unstable, e.g., for MUTAG, the validation set only contains 18 data points. We also report the training accuracy of different GNNs, where all the hyper-parameters were fixed across the datasets: 5 GNN layers (including the input layer), hidden units of size 64, minibatch of size 128, and 0.5 dropout ratio. For comparison, the training accuracy of the WL subtree kernel is reported, where we set the number of iterations to 4, which is comparable to the 5 GNN layers.
items.zh: 遵循（Yanardag & Vishwanathan, 2015; Niepert 等人，2016），我们使用 LIB-SVM（Chang & Lin, 2011）进行 10 折交叉验证。我们报告交叉验证中 10 折验证准确率的平均值和标准差。对于所有配置，应用 5 层 GNN（包括输入层），所有 MLP 有 2 层。在每个隐藏层应用批归一化（Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015）。我们使用 Adam 优化器（Kingma & Ba, 2015），初始学习率为 0.01，每 50 个 epoch 将学习率衰减 0.5。我们为每个数据集调整的超参数为：（1）隐藏单元数 ∈ {16,32}（生物信息学图）和 64（社交图）；（2）批大小 ∈ {32,128}；（3）密集层后的丢弃率 ∈ {0,0.5}（Srivastava 等人，2014）；（4）epoch 数，即选择在 10 折上平均交叉验证准确率最高的单个 epoch。注意，由于数据集规模小，另一种使用验证集进行超参数选择的设置极其不稳定，例如对于 MUTAG，验证集仅包含 18 个数据点。我们还报告了不同 GNN 的训练准确率，其中所有超参数在所有数据集上固定：5 层 GNN（包括输入层），隐藏单元大小为 64，小批量大小为 128，丢弃率为 0.5。作为比较，报告了 WL 子树核的训练准确率，其中迭代次数设置为 4，与 5 层 GNN 相当。

items.en: Baselines. We compare the GNNs above with a number of state-of-the-art baselines for graph classification: (1) the WL subtree kernel (Shervashidze et al., 2011), where C𝐶C-SVM (Chang & Lin, 2011) was used as a classifier; the hyper-parameters we tune are C𝐶C of the SVM and the number of WL iterations ∈{1,2,…,6}absent12…6\in\{1,2,\ldots,6\}; (2) state-of-the-art deep learning architectures, i.e., Diffusion-convolutional neural networks (DCNN) (Atwood & Towsley, 2016), PATCHY-SAN (Niepert et al., 2016) and Deep Graph CNN (DGCNN) (Zhang et al., 2018); (3) Anonymous Walk Embeddings (AWL) (Ivanov & Burnaev, 2018). For the deep learning methods and AWL, we report the accuracies reported in the original papers.
items.zh: 基线。我们将上述 GNN 与多个图分类的最新基线进行比较：（1）WL 子树核（Shervashidze 等人，2011），使用 C-SVM（Chang & Lin, 2011）作为分类器；我们调整的超参数是 SVM 的 C 和 WL 迭代次数 ∈ {1,2,…,6}；（2）最先进的深度学习架构，即扩散卷积神经网络（DCNN）（Atwood & Towsley, 2016）、PATCHY-SAN（Niepert 等人，2016）和深度图 CNN（DGCNN）（Zhang 等人，2018）；（3）匿名游走嵌入（AWL）（Ivanov & Burnaev, 2018）。对于深度学习方法和 AWL，我们报告原始论文中报告的准确率。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Training set performance of GINs, less powerful GNN variants, and the WL subtree kernel.
items.capZh: 图 4：GIN、较弱 GNN 变体和 WL 子树核的训练集性能。

items.en: Training set performance. We validate our theoretical analysis of the representational power of GNNs by comparing their training accuracies. Models with higher representational power should have higher training set accuracy. Figure 4 shows training curves of GINs and less powerful GNN variants with the same hyper-parameter settings. First, both the theoretically most powerful GNN, i.e. GIN-ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon and GIN-0, are able to almost perfectly fit all the training sets. In our experiments, explicit learning of ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon in GIN-ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon yields no gain in fitting training data compared to fixing ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon to 0 as in GIN-0. In comparison, the GNN variants using mean/max pooling or 1-layer perceptrons severely underfit on many datasets. In particular, the training accuracy patterns align with our ranking by the models’ representational power: GNN variants with MLPs tend to have higher training accuracies than those with 1-layer perceptrons, and GNNs with sum aggregators tend to fit the training sets better than those with mean and max-pooling aggregators.
items.zh: 训练集性能。我们通过比较训练准确率来验证我们对 GNN 表征能力的理论分析。具有更高表征能力的模型应具有更高的训练集准确率。图 4 显示了 GIN 和较弱 GNN 变体在相同超参数设置下的训练曲线。首先，理论上最强大的 GNN，即 GIN-ε 和 GIN-0，能够几乎完美地拟合所有训练集。在我们的实验中，与 GIN-0 中固定 ε 为 0 相比，GIN-ε 中显式学习 ε 在拟合训练数据方面没有带来增益。相比之下，使用均值/最大池化或 1 层感知器的 GNN 变体在许多数据集上严重欠拟合。特别地，训练准确率模式与我们的模型表征能力排序一致：具有 MLP 的 GNN 变体往往比具有 1 层感知器的变体具有更高的训练准确率，而具有求和聚合器的 GNN 往往比具有均值和最大池化聚合器的 GNN 更好地拟合训练集。

items.en: On our datasets, training accuracies of the GNNs never exceed those of the WL subtree kernel. This is expected because GNNs generally have lower discriminative power than the WL test. For example, on IMDBBINARY, none of the models can perfectly fit the training set, and the GNNs achieve at most the same training accuracy as the WL kernel. This pattern aligns with our result that the WL test provides an upper bound for the representational capacity of the aggregation-based GNNs. However, the WL kernel is not able to learn how to combine node features, which might be quite informative for a given prediction task as we will see next.
items.zh: 在我们的数据集上，GNN 的训练准确率从未超过 WL 子树核。这是预期的，因为 GNN 通常具有比 WL 测试更低的判别能力。例如，在 IMDBBINARY 上，没有一个模型能完美拟合训练集，GNN 最多达到与 WL 核相同的训练准确率。这种模式与我们的结果一致，即 WL 测试为基于聚合的 GNN 的表征能力提供了上界。然而，WL 核不能学习如何组合节点特征，这对于给定的预测任务可能非常有用，我们接下来将看到这一点。

items.en: Test set performance. Next, we compare test accuracies. Although our theoretical results do not directly speak about the generalization ability of GNNs, it is reasonable to expect that GNNs with strong expressive power can accurately capture graph structures of interest and thus generalize well. Table 1 compares test accuracies of GINs (Sum–MLP), other GNN variants, as well as the state-of-the-art baselines.
items.zh: 测试集性能。接下来，我们比较测试准确率。虽然我们的理论结果没有直接涉及 GNN 的泛化能力，但可以合理预期，具有强表达能力的 GNN 能够准确捕获感兴趣的图结构，从而很好地泛化。表 1 比较了 GIN（Sum–MLP）、其他 GNN 变体以及最先进基线的测试准确率。

items.en: First, GINs, especially GIN-0, outperform (or achieve comparable performance as) the less powerful GNN variants on all the 9 datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance. GINs shine on the social network datasets, which contain a relatively large number of training graphs. For the Reddit datasets, all nodes share the same scalar as node feature. Here, GINs and sum-aggregation GNNs accurately capture the graph structure and significantly outperform other models. Mean-aggregation GNNs, however, fail to capture any structures of the unlabeled graphs (as predicted in Section 5.2) and do not perform better than random guessing. Even if node degrees are provided as input features, mean-based GNNs perform much worse than sum-based GNNs (the accuracy of the GNN with mean–MLP aggregation is 71.2±plus-or-minus\pm4.6% on REDDIT-BINARY and 41.3±plus-or-minus\pm2.1% on REDDIT-MULTI5K). Comparing GINs (GIN-0 and GIN-ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon), we observe that GIN-0 slightly but consistently outperforms GIN-ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon. Since both models fit training data equally well, the better generalization of GIN-0 may be explained by its simplicity compared to GIN-ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon.
items.zh: 首先，GIN，特别是 GIN-0，在所有 9 个数据集上优于（或达到与）较弱的 GNN 变体相当的性能，实现了最先进的性能。GIN 在社交网络数据集上表现出色，这些数据集包含相对大量的训练图。对于 Reddit 数据集，所有节点共享相同的标量作为节点特征。这里，GIN 和求和聚合 GNN 准确捕获了图结构，并显著优于其他模型。然而，均值聚合 GNN 未能捕获未标记图的任何结构（如第 5.2 节所预测），性能不比随机猜测好。即使节点度数作为输入特征提供，基于均值的 GNN 也比基于求和的 GNN 差得多（mean–MLP 聚合的 GNN 在 REDDIT-BINARY 上的准确率为 71.2±4.6%，在 REDDIT-MULTI5K 上为 41.3±2.1%）。比较 GIN（GIN-0 和 GIN-ε），我们观察到 GIN-0 略微但持续优于 GIN-ε。由于两个模型拟合训练数据同样好，GIN-0 更好的泛化可能归因于其相对于 GIN-ε 的简单性。

items.en: In this paper, we developed theoretical foundations for reasoning about the expressive power of GNNs, and proved tight bounds on the representational capacity of popular GNN variants. We also designed a provably maximally powerful GNN under the neighborhood aggregation framework. An interesting direction for future work is to go beyond neighborhood aggregation (or message passing) in order to pursue possibly even more powerful architectures for learning with graphs. To complete the picture, it would also be interesting to understand and improve the generalization properties of GNNs as well as better understand their optimization landscape.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们为推理 GNN 的表达能力建立了理论基础，并证明了流行 GNN 变体表征能力的紧界。我们还设计了一个在邻居聚合框架下可证明的最大强大 GNN。未来工作的一个有趣方向是超越邻居聚合（或消息传递），以追求可能更强大的图学习架构。为了完善这一图景，理解和改进 GNN 的泛化性质以及更好地理解其优化景观也将是有趣的。
